awards.winner: Ales Bialiatski / Memorial / Center for Civil Liberties
awards.film: The Peace Prize laureates represent civil society in their home countries. They have for many years promoted the right to criticise power and protect the fundamental rights of citizens. They have made an outstanding effort to document war crimes, human right abuses and the abuse of power.
